phaseName: Learn BN, intervene on Y, sample
goal: Fit BN parameters to the data, perform do(Y=0) intervention, and sample 10k points to /app/final_bn_sample.csv. Also write /app/intervened_dag.csv.
summary: Fitted a LinearGaussianBayesianNetwork from the recovered DAG. Performed do(Y=0) intervention (variance 1e-9) by removing edges into Y. Sampled 10,000 rows with deterministic topological forward sampler. Outputs: /app/intervened_dag.csv (4 edges, Y has no parents), /app/final_bn_sample.csv (10000 × 5 with original column order). Verified Y mean ≈ 2e-11, Y std ≈ 1e-9.
stepSummaries: 1. Write learn_and_sample.py: build BayesianNetwork from learned DAG, fit parameters using MLE (discrete) or LinearGaussian (continuous), perform do(Y=0) intervention, sample 10000 rows with fixed seed, and write /app/intervened_dag.csv and /app/final_bn_sample.csv. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Real verification executed the artifact end-to-end (sampled from the BN, read CSVs back, checked Y statistics and DAG structure).
gateVerdicts.evidence: Sample shape=(10000,5), cols match original, Y mean≈2e-11, Y std≈1e-9, intervened DAG has 4 edges with no Y parents.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to fit BN, intervene on Y=0, sample 10k. All three achieved; outputs written to the required paths.
Nothing deferred; phase goal fully met.
